title: Squirrel Removal in Northern Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Northern Brooklyn, NYC. Serving Williamsburg, Greenpoint & Bushwick. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Northern Brooklyn's dense residential neighborhoods and tree-lined streets create ideal conditions for squirrel infestations in attics, walls, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Williamsburg, Greenpoint, Bushwick, and surrounding areas, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Northern Brooklyn's brownstones, multi-family homes, and converted warehouses.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Northern Brooklyn, our team knows the specific squirrel behaviors and entry points common to the area's historic and modern buildings. We offer same-day emergency service, licensed and insured technicians, and a full warranty on all exclusion work to ensure squirrels never return.
localContext: From the converted lofts of Williamsburg to Greenpoint's classic rowhouses and Bushwick's mixed-use buildings, Northern Brooklyn's diverse architecture provides countless entry points for determined squirrels. The abundance of mature trees along McCarren Park and the East River waterfront means squirrel populations remain high year-round, making professional exclusion essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Northern Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Northern Brooklyn typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Our technicians provide free on-site inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Northern Brooklyn homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney caps, and fascia boards that have deteriorated over time. In Northern Brooklyn's older brownstones and rowhouses, cornice returns and decorative woodwork often provide easy access points. They only need a 1.5-inch opening to squeeze through.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Brooklyn humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in compliance with New York State wildlife regulations. We use live traps when necessary and focus primarily on exclusion techniques that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, ensuring they relocate naturally without harm.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause in my Northern Brooklyn home?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), shredding insulation for nests, gnawing on wooden beams and rafters, and contaminating spaces with urine and droppings. They're most active during morning and evening hours, and you'll often hear scratching, running, or chewing sounds in your attic or walls.
